parameters.apprise_url_plus: octopush://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_login_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Octopush destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise octopush:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

api_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush api key

api_login_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush api login

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush targets
